sentences.english: I wake up at five thirty every morning, even before my alarm goes off.
sentences.korean: 매일 아침 5시 반에 일어나요. 알람이 울리기 전에요.

sentences.english: The first thing I do is make coffee and pack lunches for my two kids.
sentences.korean: 가장 먼저 하는 일은 커피를 만들고 두 아이의 도시락을 싸는 거예요.

sentences.english: I drop them off at school at eight, then head straight to work.
After work, I pick up the kids, help with homework, cook dinner, and try to squeeze in some exercise.
sentences.korean: 퇴근 후 아이들을 데리러 가고 숙제를 도와주고 저녁을 만들고 운동을 좀 끼워넣으려 해요.

sentences.english: By ten PM, I'm completely exhausted, but I wouldn't trade this life for anything.
sentences.korean: 밤 10시쯤이면 완전히 지치지만 이 삶을 그 무엇과도 바꾸지 않겠어요.

quiz.question: What does '~와 바꾸다' mean in English?
